notes: Closes remaining metric-quality stubs in chain-monitor by wiring real model IDs, token cost, and hallucination flags into monitoring payloads. Evidence provenance (retrospective, 2026-07-21): IFC-215 shipped in the 2026-06-29 3-agent parallel-fleet run (PR #546, CSV flip #551) WITHOUT committed spec/plan/context_ack ceremony artifacts — a known fleet-audit finding (evidence was inconsistently committed across that fleet). No ceremony artifacts are being reconstructed after the fact; doing so would fabricate provenance. Per .specify/sprints/.gitignore ('keep ONLY canonical attestation files'), specifications/*, planning/*, and non-whitelisted files under attestations/*/ are gitignored BY DESIGN — the canonical, tracked evidence is attestation.json + task-tracking.json, both present and complete for IFC-215. The status_history Specifying/Spec Complete/Planning/Plan Complete entries describe the intended ceremony; the corresponding .md artifacts were never persisted to git and are not recoverable as authentic originals. Implementation intent was re-verified post-hoc against the merged code on main (chain-monitor.ts, scoring.chain.ts, cost-tracker.ts, and the fidelity/callback test files). The artifacts.expected/missing lists were corrected below to stop flagging gitignored-by-design paths as 'missing' (they are not tracked artifacts).
